title: NIT Warangal International Enterprises is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: NIT Warangal International Enterprises is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
NIT Warangal International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NIT Warangal International Enterprises:
NIT Warangal International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIT Warangal International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
